name: EPG Suggester
description: Scans channels without EPG assignments and intelligently suggests matching EPG sources based on channel name similarity. Strips IPTV prefixes, quality tags, and noise words to find the best match.
author: Jan Erik (custom)

fields.label: 🌐 Dispatcharr URL
fields.help_text: Full URL to your Dispatcharr instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:9191). Used for API calls.

fields.label: 👤 Admin Username
fields.help_text: Dispatcharr admin username for API authentication.

fields.label: 🔑 Admin Password
fields.help_text: Dispatcharr admin password for API authentication.

fields.label: 🎯 Minimum Match Score (0-100)
fields.help_text: Only suggest EPG entries scoring at or above this threshold. Lower = more suggestions but less accurate. Recommended: 50-70.

fields.label: 📋 Max Suggestions Per Channel
fields.help_text: Maximum number of EPG candidates to show per unmatched channel (1-10).

fields.label: 📡 Limit to EPG Sources (optional)
fields.help_text: Comma-separated EPG source names to search within. Leave blank to search all sources.

fields.label: 📂 Limit to Channel Groups (optional)
fields.help_text: Comma-separated channel group names to scan. Leave blank to scan all groups.

fields.label: 🎬 Strip Quality Tags (HD, SD, 4K, FHD, UHD…)
fields.help_text: Remove quality suffixes/prefixes before matching so 'CNN HD' matches 'CNN'.

fields.label: 🌍 Strip Geographic Prefixes (US|, USA:, UK| …)
fields.help_text: Remove country/region prefixes before matching so 'US| CNN' matches 'CNN'.

fields.label: 🔧 Strip Misc Tags (vip, backup, (A), +1 …)
fields.help_text: Remove common IPTV noise words before matching.

fields.label: ⚡ Auto-Apply Best Match (dangerous!)
fields.help_text: If enabled, automatically assign the top-scoring EPG suggestion when its score meets the minimum threshold. Disable to preview-only mode first.

fields.label: 🔒 Auto-Apply Min Score Override (0-100)
fields.help_text: Only auto-apply matches at or above this score. Acts as a safety guard. Only used when Auto-Apply is enabled.

actions.label: 🔍 Scan & Suggest EPG
actions.description: Scan all channels without EPG assigned and suggest the best matching EPG entries based on fuzzy name matching. Results shown as a text report.

actions.label: 📤 Export Suggestions to CSV
actions.description: Run the suggestion scan and save results to /data/epg_suggester_results.csv for review.

actions.label: ✅ Apply Best Suggestions
actions.description: Apply the top EPG suggestion (above the auto-apply threshold) to all unmatched channels. Requires 'Auto-Apply Best Match' to be enabled in settings. ALWAYS export and review CSV first!

actions.label: 📺 List Unmatched Channels
actions.description: Show a quick list of all channels that have no EPG assigned, without running the full suggestion engine.
